name: cinder-native
description: One continuous Cinder intelligence for Discord, Twitch, voice, Windows, and remote administration, hosted natively with systemd.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@cinder/shared && npm run build --workspace=@cinder/core && npm run build --workspace=@cinder/windows-bridge
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace=@cinder/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@cinder/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@cinder/core && npm run typecheck --workspace=@cinder/windows-bridge
